name: portal-flow-wiring
description: Wire voice-to-portal proposal flow: fix portal URLs and upgrade email templates

members.name: code-reviewer
members.prompt:
Review the following changes made to wire the voice-to-portal proposal flow. Focus on correctness, security, and consistency.

CHANGES SUMMARY:
1. Portal URL generation now uses `CLIENT_PORTAL_URL` env var (default: `https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com`) instead of in-app URLs
2. Email templates upgraded from bare text to branded bilingual HTML matching the payment-link template style
3. New regression tests added

FILES MODIFIED:
- `api/quotes/[id]/share-url.js` - Changed `getPortalBase()` to use CLIENT_PORTAL_URL, removed ensureQuotePath()
- `api/quotes/[id]/portal-links.js` - Same portal URL change
- `api/lib/autoProposal.js` - Changed `getPortalQuoteBase()` to use CLIENT_PORTAL_URL
- `api/quotes/index.js` (line ~384-385) - Changed URL in POST response to use CLIENT_PORTAL_URL
- `hooks/useProposalActions.ts` - Added `escapeHtml()`, `generateProposalEmailHtml()`, updated handleCreateQuote and handleSendProposal to use branded template
- `.env.example` - Added CLIENT_PORTAL_URL
- `tests/api/quotes-share-url.test.ts` - Updated env var and URLs
- `tests/api/quotes-portal-links.test.ts` - Updated env var and URLs
- `tests/api/lib/autoProposal.test.ts` - Updated env var
- `tests/api/quotes-share-url-portal.test.ts` - NEW: portal URL regression tests
- `tests/hooks/useProposalActions-email.test.ts` - NEW: email template regression tests

REVIEW CHECKLIST:
1. Security: Does escapeHtml properly prevent XSS in email templates?
2. Consistency: Do all URL generation points use the same pattern?
3. Backward compat: Does customMessage still work in handleSendProposal?
4. Email template: Does it match the payment-link template style?
5. Tests: Do they cover the key scenarios?

Read the changed files and provide a concise review.
